invoice-import.step1.title: CSV-bestand Uploaden
invoice-import.step1.description: Selecteer een CSV-bestand met factuurgegevens. Het bestand moet overeenkomen met het formaat dat wordt gebruikt door de factuurexportfunctie.
invoice-import.step1.format.title: CSV-bestandsformaat
invoice-import.step1.format.description: Verplichte velden (moeten waarden hebben): Series Name, Series ID, Date, Language, Buyer Name, Seller, Item Name, Item Unit, Item Amount, Item Price. Andere velden kunnen leeg zijn. Meerdere rijen met dezelfde Series Name, Series ID en Date worden gegroepeerd als regelitems. Voorbeeld:
invoice-import.step1.format.sample:
"Series Name","Series ID","Date","Invoice Type","Language","Buyer Name","Buyer VAT No","Buyer Country","Seller","Issuer","Email","Extra","Item Name","Item Unit","Item Amount","Item Price","Notes","Paid","Locked","Sent"
"FAC",1,"2024-01-15","standard","nl","Voorbeeld BV","NL123456789","NL","Verkoper Naam","Uitgever Naam","koper@voorbeeld.nl","","Consultancy","uur",10,50.00,"","no","no","no"
"FAC",2,"2024-01-16","standard","nl","Klant BV","NL987654321","NL","Verkoper Naam","Uitgever Naam","klant@voorbeeld.nl","","Ontwikkeling","uur",5,100.00,"","no","no","no"
